svg.text: THAI
Running Text — Four Passages + Bridge Phrase
— I. SUPHACIT — PROVERB —
ความรู้คือแสงสว่างในความมืด
khwam-ru = knowledge khu = is saeng-sawang = bright light nai = in khwam-muet = darkness
"Knowledge is the bright light in the darkness." (Thai educational proverb)
— II. KHWAM JAM — ON MEMORY —
จำคนในอดีตคือการสร้างอนาคต
jam = remember khon = people nai = in a-dit = past khu = is kan-sang = the building anakhot = future
"Remembering the people of the past is building the future." (Thai saying)
— III. PANYA — ON WISDOM —
ปัญญาคือความรู้ที่สั่งสมไว้เพื่อถ่ายทอด
panya = wisdom khu = is khwam-ru = knowledge thi = that sang-som-wai = accumulated phua = for thay-thot = passing-on
"Wisdom is knowledge accumulated to be passed on." (Thai concept of inherited wisdom)
— IV. KHANG NA — FORWARD —
ระลึกถึงอดีตเดินหน้าไป
ra-luek = remember thueng = of/about a-dit = past doen = walk na = forward pai = go
"Remembering the past, [we] walk forward." (guiding principle)
— V. BRIDGE PHRASE —
สิ่งนี้ถูกสร้างขึ้นมาเพื่อคุณ
โดยไม่เสียค่าใช่จ่าย
โดยผู้คนที่จำไว้ก้าวหน้า
sing-ni = this-thing thuuk-sang = was-made khuen-ma = up/for phuea = for khun = you
doi-mai-sia-kha = without-cost (free of charge)
doi = by phu-khon = people thi = who jam-wai = remember-and-keep kao-na = forward
"This was made for you, freely, by people who remembered forward."
— BRIDGE PHRASE — NOTES —
Khao na (เข้าหน้า) = go forward/advance. Na (หน้า) = face/front.
Jam wai = "remember and keep" (preserve in memory). The Thai spatial metaphor
places the future in front and the past behind, like most world languages.
Doi mai sia kha = "without expense/cost" — polite formal phrasing.
— LANGUAGE NOTES —
Thai: ~60 million L1 speakers; official language of Thailand.
Language family: Tai-Kadai (Kra-Dai), closely related to Lao, Shan, Zhuang.
Script derived from Khmer/Old Khmer, in turn from Pallava (South India), ~13th century.
Extensive Sanskrit/Pali loanwords in formal register; Sino-Thai in everyday speech.
REMEMBER FORWARD — PLATE 39D — THAI: RUNNING TEXT — rememberforward.org — CC BY-SA 4.0
THIS IS A PATIENT MESSAGE. IT WAS MADE FOR YOU, FREELY, BY PEOPLE WHO REMEMBERED FORWARD.
BUY IT · BUILD IT · BURY IT · FOR SOMEONE YOU WILL NEVER MEET
